items.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The TrapDoor package attack on Solana and other wallets raises concerns about security, which could impact user trust and ecosystem growth.

items.title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A 30% drop in Solana's open interest indicates reduced market confidence, potentially affecting liquidity and price stability in the near term.

items.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
items.whyYouShouldCare: The US seizing $1 billion in crypto from Iran highlights regulatory actions that could influence market dynamics and investor sentiment towards cryptocurrencies.
